title: spilanthes langbianensis
intro: Spilanthes langbianensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the 'elephant snout' due to its distinctive large flower shape. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine and has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Spilanthes langbianensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be consumed as a herbal preparation, such as a tea, tincture, or capsule, making it a popular choice among those seeking natural remedies for various health issues.
